name: Aston Bay Holdings Ltd.
description: Aston Bay Holdings Ltd. is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-grade copper and gold deposits in North America. The company's flagship projects include the Storm Copper Project on Somerset Island in Nunavut, Canada, and several high-grade gold and base metal projects in Virginia, USA. Aston Bay is dedicated to identifying and advancing high-potential mineral assets to create value for its shareholders.
